title: Stop, Look and Listen
writer: Irving Berlin, Harry B. Smith, Larry Semon
actors: Larry Semon, Dorothy Dwan, Mary Carr
plot: Luther Meek, a young, goofy citizen of a small town, foils the manager of a stranded theatrical troupe from robbing the local bank and escaping with the loot, and wins the hand of the troupe's fair leading-lady in the process.
